opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 87 Google reviews at 4.2 stars with no visible owner response pattern detected.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospects and suppress local search ranking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI to auto-generate and post branded responses to all new Rescue Rooter Boise reviews.

opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Site is phone-only with no booking tool, contact form, or GMB booking button detected.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies go to competitors who offer instant online booking.
opportunities.fix: Add AI-powered 24/7 chat or booking widget to capture leads when phones go unanswered.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and the entire contact method is a single phone number.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves zero customer data, killing follow-up and reactivation.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with auto-CRM logging to capture every caller's name and need.
